rootBarrelExemptions.ts/packages/app/src/index.ts: Application composition root still owns shell wiring; split when app shell state is broken into focused modules.
rootBarrelExemptions.ts/packages/catalog-core/src/index.ts: Catalog DTOs and validators are still consolidated until catalog schema modules are split.
rootBarrelExemptions.ts/packages/devtools/src/index.ts: Devtools package root is a compact implementation surface pending panel/protocol module split.
rootBarrelExemptions.ts/packages/editor-tools/src/index.ts: Editor-tool read models and command builders predate the barrel convention; keep explicit until sliced.
rootBarrelExemptions.ts/packages/electron-main/src/index.ts: Electron host package has one small host-capability implementation surface.
rootBarrelExemptions.ts/packages/game-workspace/src/index.ts: Game-workspace manifest, asset, and authoring helpers remain consolidated; future task should split by manifest/assets/authoring.
rootBarrelExemptions.ts/packages/native-bridge/src/index.ts: Native bridge package root is the transport loader boundary and intentionally tiny.
rootBarrelExemptions.ts/packages/policy-core/src/index.ts: Policy-core root exports the tiny default policy implementation.
rootBarrelExemptions.ts/packages/policy-examples/src/index.ts: Example policy package intentionally keeps examples in the root until example modules grow.
Render projection owns a focused retained read-model implementation pending a projection module split.
rootBarrelExemptions.ts/packages/script-host/src/index.ts: Script host package root owns the small sandbox runner implementation.
rootBarrelExemptions.ts/packages/script-sdk/src/index.ts: Script SDK root contains author-facing helpers until SDK commands/signals split.
rootBarrelExemptions.ts/packages/ui-dom/src/index.ts: DOM UI package root still contains component helpers; future UI package split should retire this exemption.
rootBarrelExemptions.ts/packages/wasm-replay-bridge/src/index: WASM replay bridge root owns the loader/facade boundary until bridge modules split.
